title: C4OS Grill Question 001: Concurrent Runs
description: Answer this one grill question locally, submit the form, then paste the generated response back into chat.

questions.label: What does multiple concurrent runs mean in the first MVP?
options: Multiple chat sessions can exist, but only one agent run may be active at a time
Multiple agent runs may be active, but only within one trusted project folder
Multiple agent runs may be active across different trusted project folders
Multiple agents may work on the same files at the same time
questions.help: Recommended answer: multiple agent runs may be active, but only within one trusted project folder, with isolated approval state, runtime session ID, tool events, artifacts, and cancellation. Same-file mutation should still be serialized or approval-gated.

questions.label: Clarifications or constraints
questions.help: Add anything that changes the recommended answer, such as cross-project runs, same-file edits, UI expectations, or approval behavior.
